ratings.notes: proposed_contextual_controlled<TAB>4<TAB>5<TAB>3<TAB>4<TAB>Short note: Response is contextually relevant and maintains persona consistency but could improve naturalness in delivery for a higher overall quality.
baseline_no_context<TAB>2<TAB>4<TAB>4<TAB>5<TAB>Short note: While the response adheres to formal tone, it lacks immediate relevance and urgency fitting the dynamic context of Salt Bazaar's chaos.
